text: The issue is clear: the badge column uses `flex-shrink-0 ml-2` but the badges themselves (`text-[9px] h-4 px-1`) can still overflow the card boundary when the token name/symbol area is wide. The `overflow-visible` on the Card is what causes badges to render outside the card bounds. The fix: remove `overflow-visible`, give the badge column a fixed `min-w` so it never gets squeezed, and ensure the left side truncates properly.
